acceptance_criteria.css_changes_trigger_token_refresh: Yes - handleFileEvent calls loadTokens for CSS files
acceptance_criteria.debounce_prevents_rapid_reparsing: Yes - 100ms poll interval configured in Rust watcher
acceptance_criteria.file_watcher_running: Yes - starts when project opens via useFileWatcher hook
acceptance_criteria.frontend_receives_events: Yes - useFileWatcher subscribes to file-changed Tauri event
acceptance_criteria.ui_updates_without_full_refresh: Yes - incremental state updates via Zustand

title: File watcher integration and live updates
